summary: Relaxed CycleService.GetReleaseTrain/MarkReleaseTrainReleased to tolerate a null .doti/cycle-state.json (BuildReleaseTrain's state is now CycleState?; feature-half empty on null, bug-half always consulted; no synthetic state written - BugReleaseGit self-maintains via tag-reachability). A confirmed bug-fix-only mini-cycle now releases as patch via gate --profile release + hx release with NO feature stamp (stamp guard correctly left untouched - the release path never calls Stamp). A truly empty repo still fails closed.
